name: Time Thief Temporwhal
name_jp: クロノダイバー・テンプホエーラー
desc: You can Tribute this card, then target 1 monster your opponent controls; banish it until the End Phase. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 "Time Thief" monster you control, except "Time Thief Temporwhal"; return that monster to the hand, and if you do, Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Time Thief Temporwhal" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Tribute this card, then target 1 monster your opponent controls; banish it until the End Phase. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 "Time Thief" monster you control, except "Time Thief Temporwhal"; return that monster to the hand, and if you do, Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Time Thief Temporwhal" once per turn.
eff: You can Tribute this card, then target 1 monster your opponent controls; banish it until the End Phase. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 "Time Thief" monster you control, except "Time Thief Temporwhal"; return that monster to the hand, and if you do, Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Time Thief Temporwhal" once per turn.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

jp_sets.set: Yu-Gi-Oh! OCG Structures Volume 3 promotional card

action: Returns banished cards to the field
Returns from your field to your hand
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
